text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, all you nice kids! Feeling good?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We've got one heck of an episode today. It's
"Golshi's Birthday Extravaganza" straight from
Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Say what? That doesn't even make sense.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Correct, Jordan. And what do you think would
make Golshi happiest on this special day?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Answer in the next tenth of a second or face the
wrath of my new birthday trick. ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: At least pretend to give me a chance...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Wait, that means you, like, want a present?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Fine, I guess I'm good with nails or
whatever. You're all about that red, so—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You can paint me red using just your nails?! That's
awesome! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Don't be crazy! Whatever, I know you're just
gonna play a new dumb trick on me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
